Hi! I’m Lóvi AI Assistant, here to help you with all things skin care.

How does your skin feel today?

It’s fine

Not good

Great

Great to hear that!

UV Index is high today. To make sure your skin is protected don’t forget to use SPF before going out.

How can I improve

my evening routine?

✦ Based on your SkinID and current routine

Consider adding a serum with retinol or a retinoid to your evening routine to slow down the skin-aging process:

Loved by both
beginners & enthusiasts

  • Melissa P.

    Nov 27th, 2023 / UX Research

    I was recommended products that fit me 100% and, more importantly, didn't cost like a spaceship. Thank you!

  • Merilyn D.

    Nov 18th, 2023 / AppStore

    Simply Love it!

    My pores have definitely become cleaner, I can really feel the washing done very thoroughly. And the scanner shows less green in the center of the face.

  • Tracy K.

    March 14, 2025

    Verified

    Future is here

    Man, I didn’t expect to see such technology. No need to go and pay cosmetologists anymore.

  • Chelsey J.

    Dec 15th, 2023 / UX Research

    Just thank you

    A useful app with a notion of maintaining healthy lifestyle, keeping time for yourself, focusing on yourself. That’s a different approach telling that you are important, and not aimed at successful success, as was previously fashionable.

  • Kate K.

    Nov 18th, 2023 / Diary Research

    I've been enjoying the Lovi app, especially the tutorials like facial massage instructions. The facial scan was insightful, and scanning my products provided useful information.

  • Kate R.

    May 17, 2025

    Verified

    Makes things easier

    I don't have to spend hours researching what products to by anymore, which is a nice bonus. Oh and tracking my progress kept me from quitting during the initial purging stage

  • Melissa P.

    Dec 27th, 2024 / UX Research

    I was recommended products that fit me 100% and, more importantly, didn't cost like a spaceship. Thank you!

  • Tracy K.

    May 23, 2025

    Verified

    No more wasting money on the wrong skincare

    It feels like the app knows my skin better than me

    Nov 18th, 2024 / AppStore

    Simply Love it!

    My pores have definitely become cleaner, I can really feel the washing done very thoroughly. And the scanner shows less green dots in the center of the face.

FAQ

What is Lovi™?

Lovi™ is a personal skincare assistant iOS app. It features a cosmetics scanner, a face scanner trained by a medical board, and an expert skincare guidance provided through a chat with our AI assistant.

It also has personalized routine programs and product recommendations tailored to your unique needs.

Is it safe & secure?

At Lóvi, we are dedicated to ensuring a secure user environment. All skincare recommendations in the app are safe for all skin types, including sensitive skin, and are suitable for pregnant or breastfeeding women.

Are you brand-affiliated?

Lóvi stands as a 100% independent project. We prioritize skincare science, offering recommendations based on product composition rather than brand hype.

How are you science-backed exactly?

Lóvi’s recommendations are rooted in a comprehensive, science-backed methodology that prioritizes safety and evidence-based insights.

Our Comprehensive Safety Evaluation assesses each product against international standards, referencing trusted sources like the European Chemical Agency, FDA, TGA, and the Cosmetic Ingredient Review (CIR). This ensures we identify and flag harmful ingredients based on authoritative data.

Additionally, our fit scoring system combines scientific research with dermatologist, chemist, and aesthetician input to provide clear, reliable product evaluations tailored to each user’s skin needs.

With Lóvi, you receive recommendations based on proven data and robust scientific analysis, ensuring safe and effective skincare guidance.
